task_completion.description: Access the JFrog Artifactory web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the JFrog Artifactory dashboard or login screen at http://localhost:8082.
The Artifactory UI showing the Artifacts tree or repository list with 'example-repo-local' visible and selected.
The Artifacts tree expanded to show the path 'org/apache/commons/commons-lang3/3.14.0/' with the file 'commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar' selected.

task_completion.description: View the SHA-256 checksum of the artifact
task_completion.visual_evidence: The artifact details panel (usually under 'General' or 'Checksums' tab) displaying the SHA-256 checksum value for the selected jar file.

task_completion.description: Save the SHA-256 checksum to the specified text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor showing the creation or content of '/home/ga/artifact_checksum.txt' containing exactly the 64-character string '7b96bf3ee68949abb5bc465559ac270e0551596fa34523fddf890ec418dde13c'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Artifactory web UI to locate the artifact
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the JFrog Artifactory web interface in a browser, rather than relying solely on terminal commands (like curl) to query the API.

integrity.description: The output file contains only the checksum
integrity.visual_evidence: The content of '/home/ga/artifact_checksum.txt' must be exactly the 64-character hex string, with no additional text like 'SHA-256:', the filename, or other formatting.

integrity.description: The agent actually navigated the repository tree
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be evidence of the agent expanding the repository tree or searching for the artifact in the UI, rather than magically knowing the exact checksum without viewing it.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The JFrog Artifactory instance is accessible at http://localhost:8082. The target artifact is located in the 'example-repo-local' repository at the path 'org/apache/commons/commons-lang3/3.14.0/commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar'. The expected SHA-256 checksum for this artifact is exactly '7b96bf3ee68949abb5bc465559ac270e0551596fa34523fddf890ec418dde13c'. The output file must be saved at '/home/ga/artifact_checksum.txt'.
